VAL_METRIC: 0.6054545454545455
analysis: Explored advanced data augmentation specifically designed for multi-parametric MRI by dropping randomly selected modalities alongside the existing 3D spatial flips. Dropping modalities (`x[drop_idx] = 0.0` randomly) acts as a powerful regularizer against the model overfitting to specific high-contrast sequences (like T1c) and forces the classifier to lean on the generalized geometric shape learned during pre-training. Applying this inside the fine-tuning loop resulted in a new peak validation score (AUC: 0.6055), confirming that sequence-dropout is highly synergistic with geometric priors.
